name: print-farm-manager
desc: Self-hosted print farm manager for multi-brand 3D printer fleets — Prusa, Bambu, Elegoo, Klipper. Live fleet monitoring, automated job dispatch, no cloud.
descFull: Self-hosted print farm manager for multi-brand 3D printer fleets — Prusa, Bambu, Elegoo, Klipper. Live fleet monitoring, automated job dispatch, no cloud.
